diagrams.title: Tree vs Forest Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows a single tree on left and a forest (collection of 3 trees) on right, demonstrating how removing root converts tree to forest
elements: Single tree with root A and children B,C,D
Forest with roots X,Y,Z as separate trees
diagrams.purpose: Understanding definition and difference between tree and forest

diagrams.title: Parent Pointer Representation
diagrams.description: Array representation showing how each node stores parent index, with roots having -1

diagrams.title: Left-Child Right-Sibling Conversion
diagrams.description: Shows how a general tree with multiple children is converted to binary tree using LCRS representation
elements: Original tree with parent and multiple children
diagrams.purpose: Understanding tree to binary tree conversion for forests

diagrams.title: Spanning Forest in Disconnected Graph
diagrams.description: Shows a graph with two connected components and its spanning forest
diagrams.purpose: Understanding spanning forest concept in graph theory
